title: HOMCOM 50L Sensor Bin with Quiet Soft-Close Lid, Automatic Touchless Motion Sensor Rubbish Bin with Fingerprint Resistant, Stainless Steel for Hygienic Kitchen, Home Office Use, Black
features: Sensor motion: Built-in infrared detects movement within 15-20cm range. Wave hand to open and close - makes it hygienic and easy to use. Automatically closes after few seconds of inactivity.

50 litre capacity: Medium-large size is suitable for use with family households, keeping all food and waste stored in the bin during the week. Removable inner bucket with handle for easy lifting and mess-free emptying.
Stainless steel body: Built to last with a rust-proof, fingerprint-resistant finish that stays clean and smudge-free. Easy to maintain with a sleek, modern look—great for kitchens and dining areas.

Quiet closure system: The soft-close lid ensures a gentle, near-silent close every time, helping to maintain a peaceful atmosphere. Use this sensor bin in kitchens or offices without disturbing anyone
Dimensions: 81.5H x 30.5L x 30.5W x cm. Capacity: 50L.
